channel.title: Installation on CrySPY
channel.description: Recent content in Installation on CrySPY

item.title: System requirements
item.description: You need (CrySPY + Python environment + structure optimizer) in your workstation, super computer, etc. Python Tested with Python 3.8.5 on Mac, and Python 3.8.2, 3.8.3 on Linux. Python 3.x.x COMBO pymatgen PyXtal (CrySPY 0.9.0 or later) Structure optimizer At least one optimizer is required. First-principles calculation VASP Quantum Espresso OpenMX (CrySPY 0.9.0 or later) Interatomic potential soiap LAMMPS Others find_wy (optional in CrySPY 0.

item.title: find_wy (optional)
item.description: CrySPY have utilized find_wy to generate a random structure for a given space group (symmetry). However, CrySPY employs PyXtal library for structure generation as default since version 0.9.0. You can skip to install find_wy in CrySPY 0.9.0 or later, but you may use find_wy. For CrySPY 0.8.x or earlier, find_wy is required to generate a random structure for a given space group. You can skip to install find_wy in CrySPY 0.

item.title: CrySPY
item.description: Installation of CrySPY is very simple. Just download it! Download You can put the source code of CrySPY in an arbitrary directory. Here, let us put the source code in ~/CrySPY_root/x.x.x (x.x.x means the version). Use git or the compressed file. Git $ mkdir ~/CrySPY_root $ cd ~/CrySPY_root $ git clone https://github.com/Tomoki-YAMASHITA/CrySPY.git x.x.x zip or tar.gz file Download the source as a zip or tar.gz file from GitHub release .
